paper_title: Opportunity analysis of agriculture products in Sri Lanka: Measuring markets and feasibility
research_answer: Among selected agricultural products, Shrimp, Pepper, Mango, Vanilla, Ginger, and Cinnamon are growing fastest in world markets between 2012–2016. A second tier of moderately growing products includes Cuttlefish/Octopus & Bivalves, Plantains & Bananas, Soursop & Passion Fruits, and Bell Pepper. Exporters should exercise caution with products showing limited growth — including Cucumber & Gherkin, Tomatoes, Clove, Pineapple, Strawberry, Cut Flowers, Live Fish, and Sea Cucumber. Most concerning are products with actively shrinking world markets: Cardamom, Nutmeg & Mace, Cassava, Live Plants, and Foliage & Branches. These declining global trends suggest structural demand shifts rather than temporary fluctuations.
supporting_quotes: Shrimp, Pepper, Mango, Vanilla, Ginger & Cinnamon have the highest growth rates
Cuttlefish, Octopus & Bivalves, Plantains & Bananas, Soursop & Passion Fruits, Bell Pepper are also growing in the world market
Cucumber & Gherkin, Tomatoes, Clove, Pineapple, Strawberry, Cut Flowers, Live Fish, Sea Cucumber have more limited growth
Cardomom, Nutmeg & Mace, Cassava, Live Plants, Foliage & Branches have shrinking markets

data_points.product: Shrimp, Pepper, Mango, Vanilla, Ginger, Cinnamon
Cucumber & Gherkin, Tomatoes, Clove, Pineapple, Strawberry, Cut Flowers, Live Fish, Sea Cucumber
Cardamom, Nutmeg & Mace, Cassava, Live Plants, Foliage & Branches
